# Prairie Garden Restoration Project

An interactive website showcasing our prairie garden restoration project, with a focus on native plants, ecological education, and community engagement.

## Overview

This project aims to:
- Restore and maintain a native prairie garden
- Educate the public about native plant species
- Provide an interactive map for exploring the garden

The website serves as a digital companion to the physical space, helping visitors learn more about the plants and their ecological roles.

## Features

- **Interactive Garden Map**
  - Clickable sections of the garden
  - Plant-specific information displayed dynamically

- **Native Plant Database**
  - Common and scientific names
  - Photos and descriptions
  - Ecological benefits (pollinators, soil health, etc.)

- **Educational Content**
  - Importance of prairie ecosystems
  - Restoration process

## Tech Stack

*(Fill this in as you build)*
- HTML / CSS / JavaScript
- (Optional) React / Tailwind
- (Optional) Leaflet.js / Mapbox for mapping
